Video.summary: Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: With over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her tips for raising and caring for chickens.
Video.title: Hens and Chicks

Video.summary: Martha shows one of the joys of planting bulbs and tubers: having beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha makes onions: French onion soup, pearl onions, fried onion rings, pickled onions.
Video.title: Onions

Video.summary: Martha makes her favorite jam recipes.
Video.title: The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast

Image.alt: The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast
The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast
The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast

Video.summary: Martha's step-by-step guide for a raised bed vegetable garden: building, preparing the soil, and planting.
Video.title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Image.alt: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Video.summary: Join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the flowers of spring. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha roasts: roast rack of lamb, salt-roasted sea bass, saffron-roasted chicken wings.
Video.title: Roasting

Video.summary: Martha harvests a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha's green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha prepares vegetables: steamed artichokes, braised leeks, fried okra, roasted garlic.
Video.title: Know Your Vegetables

Video.summary: Martha bakes yellow cake: Father's birthday cake, upside-down cake, strawberry cupcakes.
Video.title: Yellow Cake

Video.summary: Martha sautes Wiener schnitzel, chicken piccata, sole a la meuniere, calf's liver.
Video.title: Sauteing

Video.summary: Martha prepares grains: sauteed polenta, bulgur tabbouleh, breakfast quinoa, farro salad.
Video.title: Grains

Video.summary: Martha prepares shrimp: cocktail, scampi, traditional shrimp boil, simple grilled shrimp.
Video.title: Shrimp

Video.summary: Republique restaurant Chef Margarita Lorenzana-Manzke shares recipes with Martha.
Video.title: Brioche, Tarts, and Pie

Video.summary: Martha and Chef Kenji Lopez-Alt make: fried chicken sandwiches; tempura shrimp; stir-fried beef with broccoli.
Video.title: The Science of Woks and Frying

Image.alt: The Science of Woks and Frying
The Science of Woks and Frying
The Science of Woks and Frying

Video.summary: Martha invites Oscar de la Renta co-creative director Laura Kim to create her Instagrammable recipes.
Video.title: Perfect Weekend Breakfast

Video.summary: Martha shows how to complete a successful landscaping project with ease and intent.
Video.title: Martha's Easy Foundation Landscaping Project

Video.summary: Martha explores home-growing citrus from yuzus and kumquats to citrons and mandarins.
Video.title: Growing Citrus

Video.summary: Martha prepares her garden for spring's splendor, from planting to proper lawn care.
Video.title: Getting the Garden Going

Video.summary: Martha visits inspiring tropical gardens in Florida, highlighting plant varieties that can be grown anywhere.
Video.title: Tropical Plants That Can Grow Anywhere

Video.summary: Martha shares the do's and don'ts of container gardening. Plus, the art of bonsai.
Video.title: Container Gardening Made Easy

Video.summary: Martha prepares rice dishes: paella, stuffed peppers, Persian rice with potatoes.
Video.title: Rice

Video.summary: Martha makes grains: mushroom barley soup, couscous royale, grits with broiled tomatoes.
Video.title: Grains

Video.summary: Martha makes sauces: bearnaise, Kansas City barbecue, tartar, cocktail, salsa verde.
Video.title: Sauces

Video.summary: Martha makes potatoes: scalloped, potato salad, silky potato puree, smashed potatoes.
Video.title: Potatoes

Video.summary: Martha makes salads: frisee aux lardons, chopped, Caesar, stacked butter lettuce.
Video.title: Salads

Video.summary: Chef Lazaro Perez joins Martha to cook a fiesta-inspired menu.
Video.title: Mexican Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha visits Cenadou Bistrot: mussels in tomato sauce with croutons; flatbread with olives and anchovies.
Video.title: French Bistro Night

Video.summary: Martha throws an Argentinian Asado BBQ for long-time employees at her home in Bedford.
Video.title: Martha Throws an Argentine Asado BBQ

Video.summary: Martha makes corn: corn fritters, corn stock, summer corn chowder, creamed corn.
Video.title: Corn

Video.summary: Martha makes greens: sorrel soup, pasta with sardines and greens, chard frittata.
Video.title: Eat Your Greens

Video.summary: Martha makes a steakhouse dinner: martini, clams, porterhouse steak, creamed spinach.
Video.title: Steakhouse

Video.summary: Martha bakes with almonds: almond-crunch ice cream cake, blancmange, sandwich cookies.
Video.title: Almonds

Video.summary: Martha bakes with berries: blueberry tart, raspberry crumbles, frangipane phyllo tart.
Video.title: Berries

Video.summary: Martha bakes cheesecake: New York-style, cheesecake cupcakes, Italian ricotta cheesecake.
Video.title: Cheesecake

Video.summary: Martha bakes pound cake: classic, lemon, cream cheese, semolina.
Video.title: Pound Cake
